title: Gorkhas, Minorities, Rajbanshis: Decoding North Bengal's High-Stakes 2026 Contest
description: Dilip Ghosh, then chief of the BJP's state unit, had reached Darjeeling on February 24, 2021, with a mission: Counter Mamata Banerjee's strategy in the region and secure the seats in the area that would set off a ripple effect across north Bengal.
